CHBE640 Advanced Chemical Reaction Kinetics (3 Credits)

The theory and application of chemical reaction kinetics to reactor design. Reaction rate theory; homogeneous batch and flow reactors; fundamentals of catalysis; design of heterogeneous flow reactors. Prerequisite: CHBE440; or students who have taken courses with comparable content may contact the department.
